title: dendranthema indicum var. maruyamanum
intro: Dendranthema indicum var. maruyamanum, also known as Maruyama Chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Dendranthema indicum var. maruyamanum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal teas, infusions, and tonics. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying and processing its flowers, leaves, and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules.
